100 Charity

CARE FOR ONE

What are CryptoTitties?

144 CryptoTitties popped out on January 4th 2018. Making them the 19th oldest NFT and the 1st NFT charity in the world. 100 ETH donation to TheBreasties.org

Proud to support The Breasties in fun and all-inclusive way. We are the first NFT charity project in the world. Grateful to give 100ETH. Let’s use the power of NFT for the upcoming Breast Cancer Awareness Month.
